title: strongylodon pulcher
intro: Strongylodon pulcher, also known as the Butterfly Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used in the Philippines for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and seeds of the Strongylodon pulcher have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, headache, and skin infections, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
